title: HoloPops!
description: HoloPops! is a custom Minecraft resource pack inspired by the beloved virtual idols from Hololive Production!
body:
# HoloPops! ResourcePack

HoloPops is a custom Minecraft resource pack inspired by the beloved virtual idols from Hololive Production!

## 🔹 Features

* Models of each Hololive member with multiple outfits.
* Three different collectible variants:

<details>
  <summary>⚙️ Boxed Version</summary>

### A classic figurine inside a display box.
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NSuwsNWt/images/bf5a0f87551b218e2afdf1629275e6ea122851bb.png)    
</details>
<details>
  <summary>⚙️ Colored Version</summary>

### Colorful version of the boxed figurine.
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NSuwsNWt/images/7411ee7169b2cdf35f86e11a125ce378725263fd.png)     
</details>
<details>
  <summary>⚙️ Display Version</summary>

### Without a box, placed on a stylish base.
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NSuwsNWt/images/14f750e5d9a72a44ed16ba241f1d2f58cf2a0acc.png)  
</details>

At the moment, only Myth models are available. 
I plan to continue adding more until HoloEN, HoloID and HoloJP are complete.

## 🔹 Installation Guide

* Download the resource pack from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/Allery)
* Open Minecraft and go to `Options > Resource Packs`.
* Click on `Open Resource Pack Folder` and place the downloaded .zip file inside.
* Back in Minecraft, select the Resource Pack and click "Done".
* Enjoy!

## 🔹 Compatibility

* Resource Pack made only for Java. 
* Pack format is for `v1.20.6` but works with older versions.

|Old versions tested|
|-------------------|
| `1.19.4` `1.18.2` |

## 🔹 How to Obtain the Models

To obtain each model in the game, use the following command:

| Version      | Command  |
|--------------|--------------|
|v1.20.6 | ```/give @p diamond[custom_model_data=2110112]``` |
|v1.19.4 | ```/give @p diamond{CustomModelData:2110112}``` |
|v1.18.2 | ```/give @p diamond{CustomModelData:2110112}``` |

Replace the value of `CustomModelData` with the appropriate number for the desired model.

## 🔹 Credits

* Textures for the talents: [@aozane](https://x.com/aozane)
* Inspired by Hololive Production talents.

## 🔹 Feedback and Support

If you have any suggestions, feedback, or encounter issues, feel free to reach out via:

* Twitter: [@AlleryNH](https://x.com/AlleryNH)
* Sketchfab: [Allery](https://sketchfab.com/allery)

## 🔹 Terms of Use

This resource pack is a fan-made creation and follows the derivative works guidelines provided by Cover Corp. 
It is intended for personal use only and should not be used for commercial purposes.
Hololive and all associated content are the property of Cover Corp.
